challenge.title: Korak 23
challenge.description: Zatim, na kraju metode remove, smanji self.length za 1. Ovo smanjuje dužinu spojenog lista kako bi odrazilo uklanjanje čvora.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should decrement self.length by 1 at the end of the remove method.
